title: God of War Ascension - Arcade Arms
original_title: God of War Ascension - Arcade Arms
overview: Ever wondered how much damage the Blades of Chaos would do in real life? Geek and Sundry go behind the scenes of creating the real Spartan weapons that inspired the Blades of Chaos in their new segment, Arcade Arms.  Arcade Arms journeys into the shop of the real-life Hephaestus, Richard Furrer, to show us how to properly make Spartan blades. Upon completion, weapons master Peter Thomas demonstrates how deadly they can be.
